name: Sorrel Borscht
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, bring the water, potatoes, dill, and scallions to a medium boil. Cook for 5 minutes.
2. Add the chopped sorrel, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and sugar. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and discard the dill sprigs.
4. In a large bowl, beat the eggs with the cold water until smooth. Slowly pour in 2 cups of hot stock into the egg mixture, stirring constantly to prevent curdling. Then pour the egg mixture back into the soup pot, stirring thoroughly.
5. Chill until very cold, at least 3 hours.
6. Just before serving, whisk in the sour cream and garnish with dill. Top with cucumbers.
